changes.planned_change: B200 hardware spec, FA4 tile config, precision aliases, calibration bounds, and default tile sizes.
changes.risk: Low; constants are documented and bounded.
changes.why: Centralize the white-box hardware and algorithm constants used by all predictors.

changes.planned_change: White-box workload computation, occupancy model, effective bandwidth curves, and five predictor variants (baseline, occupancy-only, TMA/L2, precision-only, combined).
changes.risk: Medium; occupancy and bandwidth formulas are approximations of real B200 behavior.
changes.why: Implements the hypothesis terms and keeps predictions interpretable.

changes.planned_change: High-fidelity white-box emulator that produces ground-truth runtimes using the same bottleneck structure but hidden efficiency factors and residual noise.
changes.risk: Documented limitation; emulator is not real silicon.
changes.why: Running the full FA4 kernel matrix on real B200 silicon exceeds the experiment time budget.

changes.planned_change: Synthetic FA4 config matrix generation and deterministic 20%/20%/60% split into calibration, validation, and query sets.
changes.risk: Low; matrix excludes configs that would exhaust B200 HBM.
changes.why: Provides the dataset and split contract required by the evaluation contract.

changes.planned_change: Bounded coordinate-descent calibration of white-box correction factors on the calibration split only.
changes.risk: Low-to-medium; calibration is constrained to physically interpretable factors.
changes.why: Calibrates effective hardware constants without fitting a black-box function.

changes.planned_change: Evaluation harness computing MAPE, max APE, within-30% coverage, and bottleneck-label accuracy.
changes.why: Implements the metric contract from the accepted baseline and comparability contract.

changes.planned_change: End-to-end experiment runner orchestrating config generation, ground-truth emulation, calibration, evaluation, and result recording.

summary: Minimum code changes required to test the selected hypothesis.
title: Implementation Change Map: FA4 B200 Combined Predictor
